name: Alex Chen
text: Working with this developer was transformative. The 3D portfolio they built for our team exceeded all expectations — smooth, cinematic, and incredibly polished.

name: Sarah Mitchell
text: A rare talent who truly understands the intersection of design and engineering. The interactive experiences they create are genuinely best-in-class.

name: Marcus Johnson
text: The attention to micro-interactions and performance optimization is outstanding. Our product launch site saw a 40% increase in engagement thanks to their work.
